categories.name: Media library
categories.shortDescription: Upload audio or video, fetch transcripts, get AI insights, organize, favorite, export.

tools.name: get_signed_upload_url
tools.title: Get Signed Upload URL
tools.description: Get a pre-signed S3 URL for direct file upload to Speak AI storage. After getting the URL, PUT your file to it, then call upload_media with the S3 URL. For a simpler workflow, use upload_local_file instead which handles all steps automatically.

tools.name: upload_media
tools.title: Upload Media from URL
tools.description: Upload media from a publicly accessible URL. Processing is asynchronous — after uploading, use get_media_status to poll until state is 'processed' (typically 1-3 minutes for audio under 60 min), then use get_transcript and get_media_insights to retrieve results. For a single call that handles everything, use upload_and_analyze instead. For local files, use upload_local_file.

tools.name: upload_local_file
tools.title: Upload Local File
tools.description: Upload a local file to Speak AI for transcription and analysis. Reads the file from disk, gets a pre-signed S3 URL, uploads the file, then creates the media entry. Works with any audio or video file on the local filesystem. After upload, use get_media_status to poll for completion, then get_transcript and get_media_insights.

tools.name: upload_and_analyze
tools.title: Upload and Analyze Media
tools.description: Upload media and return media_id immediately. After this returns, poll get_media_status until state is 'processed' (typically 1-3 min for under 60min audio), then call get_media_insights for AI summaries. This async pattern is required for remote MCP transports — long blocking calls die at proxy idle timeouts.

tools.name: list_media
tools.title: List Media Files
tools.description: List and search media files in the workspace with filtering, pagination, and sorting. Use filterName for text search, mediaType to filter by audio/video/text, folderId for folder-specific results, and from/to for date ranges. Use the include param to embed additional data (transcripts, speakers, keywords) inline with each result, avoiding N+1 API calls. Returns mediaIds you can pass to get_transcript, get_media_insights, or ask_magic_prompt. For deep full-text search across transcripts, use search_media instead.

tools.name: get_media_insights
tools.title: Get Media Insights
tools.description: Retrieve AI-generated insights for a processed media file — topics, sentiment, keywords, action items, summaries, and more. The media must be in 'processed' state (check with get_media_status first). For asking custom questions about a media file, use ask_magic_prompt instead.

tools.name: get_transcript
tools.title: Get Transcript
tools.description: Retrieve the full transcript for a processed media file with speaker labels and timestamps. The media must be in 'processed' state. Use update_transcript_speakers to rename speaker labels after reviewing. For subtitle-formatted output, use get_captions instead.

tools.name: get_captions
tools.title: Get Captions
tools.description: Get captions for a media file. Captions are separate from full transcripts and are formatted for display/subtitles.

tools.name: update_transcript_speakers
tools.title: Rename Transcript Speakers
tools.description: Update or rename speaker labels in a media transcript.

tools.name: bulk_update_transcript_speakers
tools.title: Bulk Rename Speakers Across Files
tools.description: Update or rename speaker labels across multiple media files in a single operation. Applies the same speaker mappings to every specified media file. Use this instead of calling update_transcript_speakers repeatedly when renaming speakers across a project or folder.

tools.name: get_media_status
tools.title: Get Media Status
tools.description: Check the processing status of a media file. States: pending → transcribing → analyzing → processed (or failed). Poll this after upload_media until state is 'processed', then use get_transcript and get_media_insights to retrieve results.

tools.name: update_media_metadata
tools.title: Update Media Metadata
tools.description: Update metadata fields (name, description, tags, status) for an existing media file.

tools.name: delete_media
tools.title: Delete Media File
tools.description: Permanently delete a media file and all associated transcripts and insights.

tools.name: toggle_media_favorite
tools.title: Toggle Media Favorite
tools.description: Mark or unmark a media file as a favorite for quick access.

tools.name: reanalyze_media
tools.title: Re-analyze Media
tools.description: Re-run AI analysis on a media file using the latest models. Use this after Speak AI has updated its analysis capabilities or if the original analysis was incomplete.

tools.name: bulk_move_media
tools.title: Bulk Move Media Files
tools.description: Move multiple media files to a folder in a single operation. Use this for batch reorganization instead of updating media one by one.

categories.name: Ask AI (Magic Prompt)
categories.shortDescription: Run AI prompts across one file, a folder, or your whole workspace. Save favorites.

tools.name: ask_magic_prompt
tools.title: Ask AI About Your Recordings
tools.description: Ask an AI-powered question about your media using Speak AI's Magic Prompt. Supports querying a single file, multiple files, entire folders, or your whole workspace. Pass mediaIds for specific files, folderIds for entire folders, or omit both to search across all media. Use assistantType to get specialized responses (e.g., 'researcher' for academic analysis, 'sales' for deal insights). To continue a conversation, pass the promptId from a previous response. Returns a promptId — save it to continue the conversation with follow-up questions.

tools.name: retry_magic_prompt
tools.title: Retry AI Question
tools.description: Retry a failed or incomplete Magic Prompt response. Use when a previous ask_magic_prompt call returned an error or incomplete answer.

tools.name: get_chat_history
tools.title: Get Chat History
tools.description: Get a list of recent Magic Prompt conversations. Returns conversation summaries with promptIds that can be used to continue conversations via ask_magic_prompt or retrieve full messages via get_chat_messages.

tools.name: get_chat_messages
tools.title: Get Chat Messages
tools.description: Get full message history for conversations. Can filter by promptId for a specific conversation, by media/folder, or search across all chat messages. Returns questions, answers, references, and metadata.

tools.name: delete_chat_message
tools.title: Delete Chat Message
tools.description: Delete a specific chat message from conversation history.

tools.name: list_prompts
tools.title: List Prompt Templates
tools.description: List all available Magic Prompt templates. Use template IDs with ask_magic_prompt's assistantTemplateId parameter when using assistantType 'custom'.

tools.name: get_favorite_prompts
tools.title: Get Favorite Prompts
tools.description: Get all prompts and answers that have been marked as favorites. Useful for finding saved insights and important AI-generated analysis.

tools.name: toggle_prompt_favorite
tools.title: Toggle Prompt Favorite
tools.description: Mark or unmark a chat message as a favorite for easy retrieval later.

tools.name: update_chat_title
tools.title: Rename Chat
tools.description: Update the title of a chat conversation for easier identification in history.

tools.name: submit_chat_feedback
tools.title: Submit Chat Feedback
tools.description: Submit feedback on a chat response (thumbs up/down). Helps improve AI answer quality.

tools.name: get_chat_statistics
tools.title: Get Chat Statistics
tools.description: Get usage statistics for Magic Prompt / chat. Returns metrics on prompt usage, optionally filtered by date range.

tools.name: export_chat_answer
tools.title: Export Chat Answer
tools.description: Export a Magic Prompt conversation or answer. Useful for saving AI-generated summaries, reports, or analysis results.

categories.name: Search & analytics
categories.shortDescription: Full-text search across transcripts, insights, and metadata. Workspace-level stats.

tools.name: search_media
tools.title: Search Media Library
tools.description: Deep search across all media transcripts, insights, and metadata. Returns matching media with sentiment data, tags, and content excerpts. Use this to find specific topics, keywords, or themes across your entire library. For filtering by media type, folder, tags, or speakers, use the filterList parameter. Results are scoped by date range — defaults to current month if not specified.

tools.name: get_media_statistics
tools.title: Get Media Statistics
tools.description: Get workspace-level media statistics — total counts, processing status breakdown, storage usage, etc.

tools.name: list_supported_languages
tools.title: List Supported Languages
tools.description: List all languages supported for transcription. Use the language codes when uploading media with a specific sourceLanguage.

categories.name: Folders & views
categories.shortDescription: Create folders, save filtered views, bulk move files, share read-only collections.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.title: List Folders
tools.description: List all folders in the workspace with pagination and sorting.

tools.name: get_folder_info
tools.title: Get Folder Info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific folder including its contents.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.title: Create Folder
tools.description: Create a new folder in the workspace.

tools.name: clone_folder
tools.title: Clone Folder
tools.description: Duplicate an existing folder and all of its contents.

tools.name: update_folder
tools.title: Update Folder
tools.description: Update a folder's name or other properties.

tools.name: delete_folder
tools.title: Delete Folder
tools.description: Permanently delete a folder. Media within the folder will be moved, not deleted.

tools.name: get_all_folder_views
tools.title: Get All Folder Views
tools.description: Retrieve all saved views across all folders.

tools.name: get_folder_views
tools.title: Get Folder Views
tools.description: Retrieve all saved views for a specific folder.

tools.name: create_folder_view
tools.title: Create Folder View
tools.description: Create a new saved view for a folder with custom filters and display settings.

tools.name: update_folder_view
tools.title: Update Folder View
tools.description: Update an existing saved view's name, filters, or display settings.

tools.name: clone_folder_view
tools.title: Clone Folder View
tools.description: Duplicate an existing folder view.

categories.name: Recorders & surveys
categories.shortDescription: Public recording links for clients, prompted question sets, branded submission pages.

tools.name: create_recorder
tools.title: Create Recorder
tools.description: Create a new recorder or survey for collecting audio/video submissions.

tools.name: list_recorders
tools.title: List Recorders
tools.description: List all recorders/surveys in the workspace.

tools.name: get_recorder_info
tools.title: Get Recorder Info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific recorder including its settings and questions.

tools.name: clone_recorder
tools.title: Clone Recorder
tools.description: Duplicate an existing recorder including all its settings and questions.

tools.name: get_recorder_recordings
tools.title: Get Recorder Submissions
tools.description: List all submissions/recordings collected by a specific recorder.

tools.name: generate_recorder_url
tools.title: Generate Recorder Share URL
tools.description: Generate a shareable public URL for a recorder/survey.

tools.name: update_recorder_settings
tools.title: Update Recorder Settings
tools.description: Update configuration settings for a recorder (branding, permissions, etc.).

tools.name: update_recorder_questions
tools.title: Update Recorder Questions
tools.description: Update the survey questions for a recorder.

tools.name: check_recorder_status
tools.title: Check Recorder Status
tools.description: Check whether a recorder/survey is active and accepting submissions.

tools.name: delete_recorder
tools.title: Delete Recorder
tools.description: Permanently delete a recorder/survey. Existing recordings are preserved.

categories.name: Clips & exports
categories.shortDescription: Highlight clips from any time range. Export PDF, DOCX, SRT, VTT, TXT, CSV.

tools.name: create_clip
tools.title: Create Highlight Clip
tools.description: Create a highlight clip from one or more media files by specifying time ranges. Clips are processed asynchronously (states: pending, processing, processed, failed) — use get_clips to check status. Maximum total clip duration is 30 minutes. Use multiple timeRanges to stitch segments from different media files together.

tools.name: get_clips
tools.title: List Clips
tools.description: List clips, optionally filtered by folder or media files. If clipId is provided, returns a single clip with its download URL (when processed).

tools.name: update_clip
tools.title: Update Clip
tools.description: Update a clip's title, description, or tags.

tools.name: delete_clip
tools.title: Delete Clip
tools.description: Permanently delete a clip and its associated media file.

tools.name: export_media
tools.title: Export Media Transcript
tools.description: Export a media file's transcript or insights in various formats (pdf, docx, srt, vtt, txt, csv).

tools.name: export_multiple_media
tools.title: Export Multiple Media Files
tools.description: Export multiple media files at once, optionally merged into a single file.

categories.name: Meeting bot
categories.shortDescription: Schedule Speak AI to join a Zoom / Google Meet / Teams call and transcribe automatically.

tools.name: list_meeting_events
tools.title: List Meeting Events
tools.description: List scheduled or completed meeting assistant events with filtering and pagination.

tools.name: schedule_meeting_event
tools.title: Schedule AI Meeting Assistant
tools.description: Schedule the Speak AI meeting assistant to join and record an upcoming meeting.

tools.name: remove_assistant_from_meeting
tools.title: Remove Assistant from Meeting
tools.description: Remove the Speak AI assistant from an active or scheduled meeting.

tools.name: delete_scheduled_assistant
tools.title: Cancel Scheduled Meeting Assistant
tools.description: Cancel and delete a scheduled meeting assistant event.

categories.name: Automations & webhooks
categories.shortDescription: Trigger actions on new recordings. Send events to your own backend.

tools.name: list_automations
tools.title: List Automations
tools.description: List all automation rules configured in the workspace.

tools.name: get_automation
tools.title: Get Automation Details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific automation rule.

tools.name: create_automation
tools.title: Create Automation
tools.description: Create a new automation rule for automatic media processing workflows.

tools.name: update_automation
tools.title: Update Automation
tools.description: Update an existing automation rule's configuration.

tools.name: toggle_automation_status
tools.title: Enable or Disable Automation
tools.description: Enable or disable an automation rule.

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.title: Create Webhook
tools.description: Create a new webhook to receive real-time notifications when events occur in Speak AI.

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.title: List Webhooks
tools.description: List all configured webhooks in the workspace.

tools.name: update_webhook
tools.title: Update Webhook
tools.description: Update an existing webhook's URL or subscribed events.

tools.name: delete_webhook
tools.title: Delete Webhook
tools.description: Delete a webhook and stop receiving notifications at its endpoint.

categories.name: Text notes & custom fields
categories.shortDescription: Standalone AI-analyzed text notes plus custom fields you can tag any media file with.

tools.name: create_text_note
tools.title: Create Text Note
tools.description: Create a new text note in Speak AI for analysis. The content will be analyzed for insights, topics, and sentiment.

tools.name: get_text_insight
tools.title: Get Text Note Insights
tools.description: Retrieve AI-generated insights for a text note, including topics, sentiment, summaries, and action items.

tools.name: reanalyze_text
tools.title: Re-analyze Text Note
tools.description: Trigger a re-analysis of an existing text note to regenerate insights with the latest AI models.

tools.name: update_text_note
tools.title: Update Text Note
tools.description: Update an existing text note's name, content, or metadata. Updating text content will trigger re-analysis.

tools.name: list_fields
tools.title: List Custom Fields
tools.description: List all custom fields defined in the workspace.

tools.name: create_field
tools.title: Create Custom Field
tools.description: Create a new custom field for categorizing and tagging media.

tools.name: update_field
tools.title: Update Custom Field
tools.description: Update a specific custom field by ID.

tools.name: update_multiple_fields
tools.title: Bulk Update Custom Fields
tools.description: Update multiple custom fields in a single batch operation.

categories.name: Embed players
categories.shortDescription: Embeddable player widgets for media on your own website.

tools.name: create_embed
tools.title: Create Embed Widget
tools.description: Create an embeddable player/transcript widget for a media file.

tools.name: update_embed
tools.title: Update Embed Widget
tools.description: Update settings for an existing embed widget.

tools.name: check_embed
tools.title: Check Embed Exists
tools.description: Check if an embed exists for a media file and retrieve its configuration.

tools.name: get_embed_iframe_url
tools.title: Get Embed Iframe URL
tools.description: Get the iframe URL for embedding a media player/transcript on a webpage.
